AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Slime Child
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a slime.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Slime Genius
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is an exceptionally intelligent slime.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Curious Slime
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a curious slime that loves to explore and learn new things.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wild Slime
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a slime born in the wilderness.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Normal Slime
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a surprisingly normal slime born in the wilderness.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Slime Prodigy
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a slime with exceptional talents in many areas.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Slime Food Lover
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a slime with a passion for Food.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Slime Troublemaker
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a mischievous slime that likes to play tricks.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Slime Herder
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a slime that has natural affinity for animals.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Slime Toy Trader
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a slime that builds its business foundation from childhood.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Slime Water Transporter
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a slime that naturally knows the best sources of clean water and provides it to others of her kind.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Slime Solicitor
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a slime that loves persuasion and negotiation.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Slime Adult
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a slime that has fully matured.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Savage Slime
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a slime that has fully embraced its wild nature.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Slime Researcher
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a slime that manages to integrate with society and pursue scientific research.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Slime Prostitute
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a slime possessing total understanding of the human body, utilizing this knowledge to its advantage.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Hunter Slime
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a slime skilled in both tracking and hunting prey.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Slime Chef
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a slime skilled in preparing delicious meals for others.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Slime Historian
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a slime with a deep knowledge of history and culture.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Slime Therapist
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a slime skilled in providing emotional support and counseling to others.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Slime Rock Lover
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] who has a deep affinity for rocks and mineral formations.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Slime Dancer
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a slime skilled in the art of dance and performance.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Slime Farmer
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a slime skilled in cultivating crops and tending to livestock.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Slime Robotics
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a slime skilled in the design and maintenance of mechs.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Slime Construction Worker
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a slime skilled in building and maintaining structures.
